title: dimeria keenanii
intro: Dimeria keenanii, also known as Dimeria grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dimeria keenanii include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, manage diabetes, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Dimeria keenanii is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and is also made into powders or capsules for easier consumption.
